title: Garlic Beef Stir Fry
description: A quick and flavorful beef stir fry with garlic and a hint of Russian-inspired spices. Serve over rice for a satisfying meal.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of stir-fry oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced beef and cook until browned, about 3-4 minutes. Remove from the skillet and set aside.
In the same skillet, add the remaining 1 tablespoon of stir-fry oil.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the beef broth and bring to a simmer.
Return the cooked beef to the skillet and stir to coat with the sauce.
Add the chopped parsley and stir-fry for 1 minute.
Push the beef and sauce to one side of the skillet.
Add the beaten eggs to the other side and scramble until cooked through.
Mix the eggs with the beef and sauce.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve hot over rice or noodles.
